findings.title: Incorrect Equality
findings.message:

	- require(bool,error)(disputes[disputeId].status == IDisputeManager.DisputeStatus.Pending,revert DisputeManagerDisputeNotPending(IDisputeManager.DisputeStatus)(disputes[disputeId].status)) (contracts/DisputeManager.sol#84-86)
